# D-ID Node SDK

[![npm version](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/your-sdk-name.svg?style=flat-square)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@d-id/node.js-sdk)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-Apache_Licence_2.0-green?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/de-id/did-node-sdk/blob/main/LICENSE)

It's time to supercharge your product with the amazing Generative AI capabilities of D-ID's API. Using our state-of-the-art, battle-tested products, you can now create videos of Digital Humans at an unbelievable scale. Combine your ideas with our tech to create astonishing visuals that are high quality and customized to your needs

**D-ID Node SDK** specifically designed to help you incorporate the D-ID API into your applications with ease.

## Installation

Install via npm:

```bash
npm install @d-id/node.js-sdk
```

Install via yarn:

```bash
yarn add @d-id/node.js-sdk
```

## Usage

### Import DidClient

```ts
const DidClient = require("@d-id/node.js-sdk").default;
```

or

```ts
import DidClient from "@d-id/node.js-sdk";
```

## Talks

### Get talks list

- See for params - [TalksClient.list](/docs/classes/TalksClient.md#list)
- See [GetTalksDto](/docs/interfaces/GetTalksDto.md)

```ts
const did = new DidClient("DID_API_KEY");

(async () => {
  const talks: GetTalksDto = await did.talks.list();
})();
```

### Get talk by id

- See for params - [TalksClient.get](/docs/classes/TalksClient.md#get)
- See [GetTalkDto](/docs/interfaces/GetTalkDto.md)

```ts
const did = new DidClient("DID_API_KEY");

(async () => {
  const talkId = "my-talk-id";
  const talk: GetTalkDto = await did.talks.get("talk_id");
})();
```

### Create talk

- See for params - [TalksClient.create](/docs/classes/TalksClient.md#create)
- See [CreateTalkRequest](/docs/interfaces/CreateTalkRequest.md)
- See [CreateTalkResponseDto](/docs/interfaces/CreateTalkResponseDto.md)

```ts
const did = new DidClient("DID_API_KEY");

(async () => {
  const talkRequest: CreateTalkRequest = {
    script: {
      type: "text",
      subtitles: "false",
      provider: {
        type: "microsoft",
        voice_id: "en-US-JennyNeural",
      },
      ssml: "false",
    },
    config: {
      fluent: "false",
      pad_audio: "0.0",
    },
  };
  const createTalkResponse: CreateTalkResponseDto = await did.talks.create(
    talkRequest
  );
})();
```

### Create talk async

- See for params - [TalksClient.create](/docs/classes/TalksClient.md#createAsync)
- See [CreateTalkRequest](/docs/interfaces/CreateTalkRequest.md)
- See [GetTalkDto](/docs/interfaces/GetTalkDto.md)

```ts
const did = new DidClient("DID_API_KEY");

(async () => {
  const talkRequest: CreateTalkRequest = {
    script: {
      type: "text",
      subtitles: "false",
      provider: {
        type: "microsoft",
        voice_id: "en-US-JennyNeural",
      },
      ssml: "false",
    },
    config: {
      fluent: "false",
      pad_audio: "0.0",
    },
  };
  const createTalkResponse: Promise<CreateTalkResponseDto> = did.talks
    .createAsync(talkRequest)
    .then((talk) => {
      console.log(talk);
    })
    .catch((err) => console.log(err));
})();
```

### Delete talk

- See for params - [TalksClient.delete](/docs/classes/TalksClient.md#delete)
- See [GetTalkDto](/docs/interfaces/GetTalkDto.md)

```ts
const did = new DidClient("DID_API_KEY");

(async () => {
  const talkId = "my-talk-id";
  const deleteResponse = await did.talks.delete(talkId);
})();
```

## Steams

### Init a stream

- See for more details - [TalksClient.initStream](/docs/classes/TalksClient.md#initStream)
- See [InitStreamDto](/docs/interfaces/InitStreamDto.md)
- See [CreateStreamResponseDto](/docs/interfaces/CreateStreamResponseDto.md)

```ts
const did = new DidClient("DID_API_KEY");

(async () => {
  const initStreamRequest: InitStreamDto = {
    source_url: "https://url/to/a/photo/you/wish/to/animate",
  };
  const initStreamResponse: CreateStreamResponseDto =
    await did.talks.initStream(initStreamRequest);
})();
```

### Start a stream

- See for more details - [TalksClient.startStream](/docs/classes/TalksClient.md#initStream)
- See [CreateStreamRequestDto](/docs/interfaces/CreateStreamRequestDto.md)
- See [StartConnection200Response](/docs/interfaces/StartConnection200Response.md)

```ts
const did = new DidClient("DID_API_KEY");

(async () => {
  const streamId = "my-stream-id";
  const starStreamRequest: CreateStreamRequestDto = {};
  const startStreamResponse: StartConnection200Response =
    await did.talks.startStream(streamId, starStreamRequest);
})();
```

### Submit network information

- See for more details - [TalksClient.submitNetwork](/docs/classes/TalksClient.md#submitNetwork)
- See [CreateStreamIceCandidateRequest](/docs/interfaces/CreateStreamIceCandidateRequest.md)
- See [StartConnection200Response](/docs/interfaces/StartConnection200Response.md)

```ts
const did = new DidClient("DID_API_KEY");

(async () => {
  const streamId = "my-stream-id";
  const submitNetworkRequest: CreateStreamIceCandidateRequest = {};
  const submitNetworkResponse: StartConnection200Response =
    await did.talks.submitNetwork(streamId, submitNetworkRequest);
})();
```

### Create a talk stream

- See for more details - [TalksClient.createStream](/docs/classes/TalksClient.md#createStream)
- See [CreateTalkStreamRequest](/docs/interfaces/CreateTalkStreamRequest.md)
- See [createTalkStreamResponse](/docs/interfaces/createTalkStreamResponse.md)

```ts
const did = new DidClient("DID_API_KEY");

(async () => {
  const streamId = "my-stream-id";
  const createTalkStreamRequest: CreateTalkStreamRequest = {};
  const createTalkStreamResponse: CreateTalkStream200Response =
    await did.talks.createStream(streamId, createTalkStreamRequest);
})();
```

### Delete a talk stream

- See for more details - [TalksClient.deleteStream](/docs/classes/TalksClient.md#deleteStream)
- See [DeleteStreamRequest](/docs/interfaces/DeleteStreamRequest.md)
- See [StartConnection200Response](/docs/interfaces/StartConnection200Response.md)

```ts
const did = new DidClient("DID_API_KEY");

(async () => {
  const streamId = "my-stream-id";
  const deleteStreamRequest: DeleteStreamRequest = {
    session_id: "session-id",
  };
  const deleteStreamResponse: StartConnection200Response =
    await did.talks.deleteStream(streamId, deleteStreamRequest);
})();
```

## Clips

### Get clips

- See for more details - [ClipsClient.list](/docs/classes/ClipsClient.md#list)
- See [GetClipsResponse](/docs/interfaces/GetClipsResponse.md)

```ts
const did = new DidClient("DID_API_KEY");

(async () => {
  const clipsResponse: GetClipsResponse = await did.clips.list();
})();
```

### Get specific clip

- See for more details - [ClipsClient.get](/docs/classes/ClipsClient.md#list)
- See [GetClipResponse](/docs/interfaces/GetClipResponse.md)

```ts
const did = new DidClient("DID_API_KEY");

(async () => {
  const clipId = "my-clip-id";
  const clipResponse: GetClipResponse = await did.clips.get(clipId);
})();
```

### Create a clip

- See for more details - [ClipsClient.create](/docs/classes/ClipsClient.md#create)
- See [CreateClipRequest](/docs/interfaces/CreateClipRequest.md)
- See [CreateClipResponse](/docs/interfaces/CreateClipResponse.md)

```ts
const did = new DidClient("DID_API_KEY");

(async () => {
  const createClipRequest: CreateClipRequest = {
    script: {
      type: "text",
      subtitles: "false",
      provider: {
        type: "microsoft",
        voice_id: "en-US-JennyNeural",
      },
      ssml: "false",
    },
    config: {
      result_format: "mp4",
    },
    presenter_config: {
      crop: {
        type: "rectangle",
      },
    },
  };
  const createResponse: CreateClipResponse = await did.clips.create(
    createClipRequest
  );
})();
```

### Create a clip async

- See for more details - [ClipsClient.create](/docs/classes/ClipsClient.md#createAsync)
- See [CreateClipRequest](/docs/interfaces/CreateClipRequest.md)
- See [GetClipResponse](/docs/interfaces/GetClipResponse.md)

```ts
const did = new DidClient("DID_API_KEY");

(async () => {
  const createClipRequest: CreateClipRequest = {
    script: {
      type: "text",
      subtitles: "false",
      provider: {
        type: "microsoft",
        voice_id: "en-US-JennyNeural",
      },
      ssml: "false",
    },
    config: {
      result_format: "mp4",
    },
    presenter_config: {
      crop: {
        type: "rectangle",
      },
    },
  };
  const createResponse: Promise<GetClipResponse> = did.clips
    .create(createClipRequest)
    .then((clip) => {
      console.log(clip);
    })
    .catch((err) => console.log(err));
})();
```

### Delete clip

- See for params - [ClipsClient.delete](/docs/classes/ClipsClient.md#delete)
- See [GetClipsResponse](/docs/interfaces/GetClipsResponse.md)

```ts
const did = new DidClient("DID_API_KEY");

(async () => {
  const clipId = "my-clip-id";
  const deleteResponse = await did.clips.delete(clipId);
})();
```

### Get a list of the presenters

- See for more details - [ClipsClient.listPresenters](/docs/classes/ClipsClient.md#listPresenters)
- See [GetClipsPresentersResponse](/docs/interfaces/GetClipsPresentersResponse.md)

```ts
const did = new DidClient("DID_API_KEY");

(async () => {
  const presentersResponse: GetClipsPresentersResponse =
    await did.clips.listPresenters();
})();
```

### Get presenter by id

- See for more details - [ClipsClient.getPresenter](/docs/classes/ClipsClient.md#getPresenter)
- See [GetClipsPresentersResponse](/docs/interfaces/GetClipsPresentersResponse.md)

```ts
const did = new DidClient("DID_API_KEY");

(async () => {
  const presenterId = "my-presenter-id";
  const getPresenterResponse: GetClipsPresentersResponse =
    await did.clips.getPresenter(presenterId);
})();
```

### Get presenter drivers by id

- See for more details - [ClipsClient.getPresenterDrivers](/docs/classes/ClipsClient.md#getPresenterDrivers)
- See [GetClipsDriversResponse](/docs/interfaces/GetClipsDriversResponse.md)

```ts
const did = new DidClient("DID_API_KEY");

(async () => {
  const presenterId = "my-presenter-id";
  const presenterDriversResponse: GetClipsDriversResponse =
    await did.clips.getPresenterDrivers(presenterId);
})();
```
